Container.Name: Arkive
Container.Overview:
Open-source backup and disaster recovery for Unraid servers. Arkive discovers Docker containers, captures application-aware database dumps, backs up flash config, and stores encrypted snapshots in local or remote storage.
Features: - Zero-config container discovery with 50+ app profiles - Application-aware database dumps with integrity verification - Encrypted, deduplicated backups via restic - Multi-target cloud sync (B2, S3, SFTP, local) - One-click restore plan PDF - Discord/Slack/ntfy notifications - Web UI and API for setup, monitoring, backup, and restore
Container.Requires: Docker socket access and root runtime for full Unraid flash/SQLite coverage

Config.Name: Flash Drive
Config.Description: Unraid flash config directory for backup (mount /boot/config read-only)
